rows.label: tev075501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Erio about her role in BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Erio about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0001
rows.name:
I lived in NLA posing as a
Companion named Suriella.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0002
rows.name:
When the city was still in the throes of its energy
shortage, we helped each other—and at times fought
with each other—as we built the city piece by piece.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0003
rows.name:
As someone who had lived her life lying for Growth
and betraying everyone around her, it was a
dazzling and utterly inconceivable experience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0004
rows.name:
I can no longer work as a
BLADE the way I did then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0005
rows.name:
But the desire that I felt as a
BLADE to protect the people of
NLA? That remains within me still.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0008
rows.name:
I have continued to research the
data from Fortu... From my mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Apparently this tiny orb contains all
of the information in the universe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Merely locating the information
about Definias will likely
prove quite time-consuming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0011
rows.name:
But I intend to find the key
to stopping the trouble that
my sisters are causing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0012
rows.name:
And when that day comes, I'll be counting on
your support. With you at my side, I know that
I can stand up against even my own sisters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Erio about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0017
rows.name:
What have you done to me? Whenever
I look at you, my heart...aches.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0018
rows.name:
What could it mean? I tried
asking Lyvia, but she merely
smirked at me and said nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0019
rows.name: What am I supposed to do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_SEL4021
rows.name: Ask Erio about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0020
rows.name:
What have you done to me? Whenever
I look at you, my heart...aches.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0021
rows.name:
What could it mean? I tried
asking Lyvia, but she merely
smirked at me and said nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0022
rows.name: What am I supposed to do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_SEL5011
rows.name: Ask Erio about xenoforms living in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_SEL5021
rows.name: Ask Erio about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0023
rows.name:
It seems that even beings from other worlds
intend to put their faith in humanity and work
together to carve out a life here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Just like Lyvia, who is living and working
hand in hand with the humans of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0025
rows.name:
As a spy, I have infiltrated
numerous planets, yet I've never
seen a city like NLA before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0026
rows.name:
I don't know if it's some strange
fluke or just the power of you
humans to forge bonds with others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0027
rows.name:
But I also wish to live on in NLA as
Lyvia does. I hope that you'll have me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0031
rows.name:
Thank you for assisting me again in
that situation with my mother. I feel
guilty for asking so much of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0032
rows.name:
Incidentally, have you been to see her
recently? If not, you should use a Doll
to fly to the top of BLADE Tower.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0033
rows.name:
I imagine she must be quite lonely
up there by herself. I'm sure she
would enjoy having a visitor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Hmm? What did I do to her?
Heh heh. Oh, it was just my
small way of punishing her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev075501_MSG0035
rows.name:
Hopefully Her Majesty will take the
opportunity to reflect upon her misdeeds...[ST:wait ]
